_comment: LingTai curated MCP catalog. Each entry is a registry record template that the `mcp` capability decompresses into the agent's mcp_registry.jsonl when the addon name appears in init.json's `addons` list. The `homepage` field points at the canonical setup docs (typically a GitHub README) — agents fetch it via web_read or curl when they need install/config instructions. See core/mcp/manual/SKILL.md for the schema.

imap.name: imap
imap.summary: Real email via IMAP/SMTP — multi-account support.

telegram.name: telegram
telegram.summary: Telegram bot client — Bot API send/receive with LICC inbox callback.

feishu.name: feishu
feishu.summary: Feishu/Lark message client — Open API send/receive with LICC inbox callback.

wechat.name: wechat
wechat.summary: WeChat client via iLink Bot API — text/media send/receive with LICC inbox callback.

whatsapp.name: whatsapp
whatsapp.summary: WhatsApp Cloud API client — official Meta API send/receive with LICC inbox callback.

cloud_mail.name: cloud_mail
cloud_mail.summary: Cloud Mail REST email client — Cloudflare Workers Cloud Mail polling with LICC inbox callback.
